m_26_14.description: Post-transform pipeline for m_26_14-assets canonical index: unwraps top_metrics outputs, cleans null/boolean strings, stamps @timestamp, sets m_26_14.element1/2_covered flags, computes baseline_hash

description: Runs on every document written to m_26_14-assets by the entity resolution Transform. Unwraps top_metrics wrapped values, normalizes null strings and boolean strings, stamps timestamp, evaluates Element 1/2 coverage criteria, computes baseline state hash for drift detection.

script.description: Remove string 'null' fields and convert string booleans. top_metrics emits 'null' for missing fields and 'true'/'false' for booleans.
Stamp lowercase top-level host.name (canonical host identity) from asset.name, falling back to asset.fqdn. Lowercased so it joins the m_26_14-observed ledger, whose entity id is lowercased.

Derive asset.component (M-26-14 reporting component / bureau-enclave rollup dimension) from organization grouping; default 'unattributed'. The transform aggregates organization.* but not component, so derive it here.
Evaluate M-26-14 Element 1 (HWAM) and Element 2 (SWAM) coverage flags

fingerprint.description: Baseline state hash: OS version + serial + encryption status. Changes when asset state drifts.

set.description: Record when baseline was last computed

enrich.description: Look up the certified baseline hash for this asset (by asset.id) from the frozen m_26_14-asset-baselines snapshot. The baseline-snapshot transform is run-once/stopped so this hash is a fixed point-in-time certification.

script.description: Derive m_26_14.drift_detected (and mirror to asset.compliance.drift_detected): true when the asset's current baseline_hash diverges from its certified baseline. Computed on every transform checkpoint so it is stable across re-enrichment (replaces the never-built WS3 drift watcher).

remove.description: Drop the temporary enrich lookup payload
